name: Sulfuric Acid Swig
recipeInstructions: In a large pitcher, mix together the lemonade concentrate, lemon juice, and grapefruit juice. Add an amount of water as specified on the lemonade can's instructions. Pour the mixture into tall glasses, filling them about halfway. Add one scoop of lemon sherbet to each glass. Top off the glasses with club soda and serve immediately. Just before serving, sprinkle a small amount of lemon or lime-flavored powdered drink mix on top of each glass.
